data.body: STATUS (handoff): IMPLEMENTED + COMMITTED as stack commit 29d9fa863. Plan-review PASS+signed; pre-commit lint+mypy PASSED; tests/unit/test_impact_plan.py (16) + updated test_review_kernel invariant green. Introduced the per-gate impact_fn seam on pass3_decide/pass3_over_findings (code-review byte-unchanged) + decide.impact_plan (MAX+override-floor-LAST+detection; fixed the 0.68<0.70 coherence bug) + verify.plan_review_verification_model. NOT CLOSED: awaiting Gerrit Verified. NOTE: later stack children (#6/#3) reference impact_fn from this commit — their gates must ground against the stack via REBAR_GATE_REF (see epic comment).
